CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CLAYTON HOTEL PROPERTY ACQUISITION LLC BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-29-2015 AT 10:00 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED. "DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON MAY 15, 2015, IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CLAYTON HOTEL PROPERTY ACQUISITION, LLC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DE DE ROBBINS--CPA FOR DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
